unistops.name: Jubilee Conference Centre
unistops.description: A hotel and conference venue near the south entrance of Jubilee Campus, used for events, accommodation and large meetings.

unistops.name: Business School South
unistops.description: One of Nottingham University Business School's main Jubilee Campus buildings, used for teaching, seminar rooms and student services.

unistops.name: The Atrium
unistops.description: A campus restaurant and social space on the lakeside route between the main academic buildings and the halls.

unistops.name: Djanogly Library
unistops.description: The Djanogly Learning Resource Centre, Jubilee Campus's lakeside library supporting Education and Computer Science.

unistops.name: Business School North
unistops.description: The northern Business School building, with teaching rooms, seminar space, postgraduate study areas and business school services.

unistops.name: Dearing Building
unistops.description: Home to the School of Education, with reception, seminar rooms and the Atrium workspace overlooking the lakeside.

unistops.name: Yang Fujia Building
unistops.description: A multi-use academic building housing teaching space alongside services such as Careers and Employability, CELE and Applied Psychology.

unistops.name: Newark Hall
unistops.description: A Jubilee Campus hall of residence with study space, common rooms and the Welcome Point Jubilee accommodation reception.

unistops.name: Southwell Hall
unistops.description: A Jubilee Campus hall of residence close to the north entrance and sports centre, with accessible student accommodation.

unistops.name: Ingenuity Centre
unistops.description: An Innovation Park building on the south-east side of Jubilee Campus, used by university teams and partner organisations.

unistops.name: The Exchange
unistops.description: An academic building beside the Djanogly Learning Resource Centre, with teaching space and nearby study and social facilities.

unistops.name: Xu Yafen Building
unistops.description: A multi-use academic building with teaching rooms, professional services, careers support and Cafe Aspire.

unistops.name: Jubilee Campus Sports Centre
unistops.description: Jubilee's main sports and fitness hub, with a large gym, indoor courts, studio space and outdoor training facilities.

unistops.name: Welcome Point Jubilee
unistops.description: The main reception and support desk for Newark and Southwell Hall, useful for accommodation queries and arrivals.

unistops.name: Sir Colin Campbell Building
unistops.description: An Innovation Park academic building near the south side of Jubilee Campus, close to the enterprise and sustainable chemistry buildings.
